scenario.title: Promotion Celebration on the Subway
scenario.context: A crowded subway during rush hour, where Speaker 1 excitedly shares the news of a promotion they've worked hard for. The setting is loud and bustling, adding a layer of distraction to the interaction.
scenario.description: Speaker 1 is bubbling with excitement about their recent promotion and shares the news with Speaker 2. Speaker 2's reaction is key to amplifying and validating this joyful moment amidst the chaotic setting.
scenario.target_social_intent: Match Alex's intense excitement and celebrate their success while demonstrating genuine interest and validating their happy moment.
scenario.speaker1_persona: Bubbly and ecstatic, speaking quickly, smiling broadly, and gesturing with excitement.
scenario.speaker2_persona_1: Warm and highly enthusiastic, actively matching Alex’s excitement with affirmations like, 'That’s incredible! Tell me more!' and smiling openly. Jordan leans in to show genuine interest despite the noisy setting.
scenario.speaker2_persona_2: The Impatient Evader: Rushed and visibly annoyed, Jordan glances at his phone repeatedly, gives curt responses like, 'Yeah, that’s cool,' and visibly disengages from the conversation.
scenario.speaker2_persona_3: The Defensive/Snappy Reactor: Takes Alex’s excitement personally and snaps back with comments like, 'Well, some of us are still stuck in the same job,' or, 'Good for you, I guess,' with a clipped tone and crossed arms.
scenario.speaker2_persona_high: Warm and highly enthusiastic, actively matching Alex’s excitement with affirmations like, 'That’s incredible! Tell me more!' and smiling openly. Jordan leans in to show genuine interest despite the noisy setting.
scenario.speaker2_persona_low: The Defensive/Snappy Reactor: Takes Alex’s excitement personally and snaps back with comments like, 'Well, some of us are still stuck in the same job,' or, 'Good for you, I guess,' with a clipped tone and crossed arms.

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Jordan, guess what! You won’t believe it—I got the promotion! The one I’ve been talking about forever!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: What?! That’s incredible! Oh my gosh, Alex, tell me everything! I knew you could do it!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Okay, so... it’s official! I’m gonna be managing the whole project team now. They said my presentation last week sealed the deal! I mean, I was nervous but I guess it paid off!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: No way—that’s huge! Managing the whole team? You deserve this so much. I can’t imagine how proud you must feel right now!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Ahh, I’m still kind of in shock! Honestly, it’s like everything I worked for finally clicked. I’m just... so happy right now!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: You should be! This is amazing, Alex. We have to celebrate—like, properly. Dinner, drinks, the works. You earned it!
